predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_no_other_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves no other heirs.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_other_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves other heirs besides the surviving spouse.

predicates.name: other_heirs_reduce_surviving_spouse_right
predicates.description: The other heirs left by the deceased are in a category that would reduce the surviving spouse to a lesser right under applicable inheritance rules.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the entire estate as a legal consequence.

predicates.name: estate_belongs_to_deceased
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.
